modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access email through IMAP and POP3 protocols.

full_description_text: User is experiencing issues accessing their email accounts. The problem occurs when attempting to connect via IMAP and POP3 protocols. This affects the ability to send and receive messages. The issue is specific to USD email accounts.
short_description: Unable to access email through IMAP and POP3 protocols.
description: User is experiencing issues accessing their email accounts. The problem occurs when attempting to connect via IMAP and POP3 protocols. This affects the ability to send and receive messages. The issue is specific to USD email accounts.
